languages.text: {n}Абеляр, ревниво зыркнув на Нунциуса, бурчит:{/n} "Позвольте мне, Лорд-капитан. Триасомата, пред тобой {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольный Торговец{/g} {name} фон Валанциус, Лорд-капитан сего судна и повелитель{mf||ница} его экипажа. Ты до сих пор жив лишь {mf|его|ее} милостью — одно неверное слово или движение, и я лично отдам приказ блюстителям".

traits.locale_text: {n}Абеляр, ревниво зыркнув на Нунциуса, бурчит:{/n} "Позвольте мне, Лорд-капитан. Триасомата, пред тобой {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольный Торговец{/g} {name} фон Валанциус, Лорд-капитан сего судна и повелитель{mf||ница} его экипажа. Ты до сих пор жив лишь {mf|его|ее} милостью — одно неверное слово или движение, и я лично отдам приказ блюстителям".
traits.speaker: AbelardCompanion

languages.text: {n}Abelard, scowling jealously at Nuncius, mutters:{/n} "Allow me, Lord Captain. Triasomata, before you stands {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, Lord Captain of this vessel and sovereign of its crew. Solely by {mf|his|her} grace do you still live — one wrong word, one wrong movement, and I will personally call the enforcers down upon you."
languages.original_text: {n}Абеляр, ревниво зыркнув на Нунциуса, бурчит:{/n} "Позвольте мне, Лорд-капитан. Триасомата, пред тобой {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольный Торговец{/g} {name} фон Валанциус, Лорд-капитан сего судна и повелитель{mf||ница} его экипажа. Ты до сих пор жив лишь {mf|его|ее} милостью — одно неверное слово или движение, и я лично отдам приказ блюстителям".

Triasomata, before you stands Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius, Lord Captain of this vessel and sovereign of its crew. Solely by {mf|his|her} grace do you still live — one wrong word, one wrong movement, and I will personally call the enforcers down upon you."

Triasomata, before you stands Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius, Lord Captain of this vessel and sovereign of its crew. Solely by {mf|his|her} grace do you still live — one wrong word, one wrong movement, and I will personally call the enforcers down upon you."

{n}Abelard, scowling jealously at Nuncius, mutters:{/n} "Allow me, Lord Captain. Triasomata, before you stands Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius, Lord Captain of this vessel and sovereign of its crew. Solely by {mf|his|her} grace do you still live — one wrong word, one wrong movement, and I will personally call the enforcers down upon you."

languages.text: {n}アベルアルは、ヌンキウスを嫉妬深く睨みつけながら、呟く。{/n}「お任せください、船長様。トライアスオマタ、貴殿の前に立つのは、この船の船長であり、乗組員の主である{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}ローグトレーダー{/g}{name}・フォン・ヴァランキウスです。貴殿がまだ生きているのは、{mf|彼|彼女}の慈悲によるものだけです。間違った言葉一つ、間違った動き一つで、私は自ら執行者を呼び寄せるでしょう。」
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard, scowling jealously at Nuncius, mutters:{/n} "Allow me, Lord Captain. Triasomata, before you stands {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, Lord Captain of this vessel and sovereign of its crew. Solely by {mf|his|her} grace do you still live — one wrong word, one wrong movement, and I will personally call the enforcers down upon you."

traits.locale_text: アベルアルドは、ヌンキウスを嫉妬深く睨みつけながら、呟く。{n}「お任せください、船長様。トライアスオマタ、貴殿の前に立つのは、この船の船長であり、乗組員の主であるローグトレーダー{name}・フォン・ヴァランキウスです。貴殿がまだ生きているのは、彼の慈悲によるものだけです。間違った言葉一つ、間違った動き一つで、私は自ら執行者を呼び寄せるでしょう。」

{n}アベルアルは、ヌンキウスを嫉妬深く睨みつけながら、呟く。{/n}「お任せください、船長様。トライアスオマタ、貴殿の前に立つのは、この船の船長であり、乗組員の主である{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}ローグトレーダー{/g}{name}・フォン・ヴァランキウスです。貴殿がまだ生きているのは、{mf|彼|彼女}の慈悲によるものだけです。間違った言葉一つ、間違った動き一つで、私は自ら執行者を呼び寄せるでしょう。」

languages.text: {n}阿贝拉德嫉妒地瞪了努恩修斯一眼，咕哝道：{/n}“请让我来，舰长大人。三相体，你面前的是{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯，这艘星舰的舰长和全体船员的主君。全凭{mf|his|her}的仁慈，你才能活到现在——说错一句话，做错一个动作，我就亲自叫执法者来收拾你。”
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard, scowling jealously at Nuncius, mutters:{/n} "Allow me, Lord Captain. Triasomata, before you stands {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, Lord Captain of this vessel and sovereign of its crew. Solely by {mf|his|her} grace do you still live — one wrong word, one wrong movement, and I will personally call the enforcers down upon you."

traits.locale_text: {n}阿贝拉德嫉妒地瞪了努恩修斯一眼，咕哝道：{/n}“请让我来，舰长大人。三相体，你面前的是{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯，这艘星舰的舰长和全体船员的主君。全凭{mf|his|her}的仁慈，你才能活到现在——说错一句话，做错一个动作，我就亲自叫执法者来收拾你。”

languages.text: {n}L'air renfrogné, Abélard lance un regard envieux à Nuncius et marmonne :{/n} « Permettez-moi, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Triasomata, devant vous se tient {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}{mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}{/g} {name} von Valancius, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} de ce vaisseau et {mf|souverain|souveraine} de son équipage. C'est uniquement par sa grâce que vous êtes encore en vie. Il suffira d'un faux pas ou d'une parole déplacée pour que j'ordonne personnellement aux prévôts de vous abattre. »
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard, scowling jealously at Nuncius, mutters:{/n} "Allow me, Lord Captain. Triasomata, before you stands {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, Lord Captain of this vessel and sovereign of its crew. Solely by {mf|his|her} grace do you still live — one wrong word, one wrong movement, and I will personally call the enforcers down upon you."

traits.locale_text: {n}L'air renfrogné, Abélard lance un regard envieux à Nuncius et marmonne :{/n} « Permettez-moi, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Triasomata, devant vous se tient {mf|le {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}libre-marchand{/g}|la libre-marchande} {name} von Valancius, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} de ce vaisseau et {mf|souverain|souveraine} de son équipage. C'est uniquement par sa grâce que vous êtes encore en vie. Il suffira d'un faux pas ou d'une parole déplacée pour que j'ordonne personnellement aux prévôts de vous abattre. »

languages.text: {n}Abelard lanza una mirada recelosa a Nuncius y murmura:{/n} «Permítame, Lord Capitán. Triasómata, ante usted se encuentra {mf|el|la} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante Independiente{/g} {name} von Valancius, Lord Capitán de esta nave y soberan{mf|o|a} de su tripulación. Es su gracia lo que le permite vivir: una palabra o movimiento erróneos y enviaré personalmente a los guardias contra usted».
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard, scowling jealously at Nuncius, mutters:{/n} "Allow me, Lord Captain. Triasomata, before you stands {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, Lord Captain of this vessel and sovereign of its crew. Solely by {mf|his|her} grace do you still live — one wrong word, one wrong movement, and I will personally call the enforcers down upon you."

traits.locale_text: {n}Abelard lanza una mirada recelosa a Nuncius y murmura:{/n} «Permítame, Lord Capitán. Triasómata, ante usted se encuentra {mf|el|la} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante Independiente{/g} {name} von Valancius, Lord Capitán de esta nave y soberan{mf|o|a} de su tripulación. Es su gracia lo que le permite vivir: una palabra o movimiento erróneos y enviaré personalmente a los guardias contra usted».

languages.text: {n}Nuncius'a kıskançlıkla kaşlarını çatan Abelard mırıldanıyor.{/n} "İzninizle Lord Kaptan. Üçyeköz, karşında {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir{/g} {name} von Valancius duruyor. Kendisi bu geminin Lord Kaptanı ve mürettebatının hükümdarıdır. Onun lütfu sayesinde hâlâ hayattasın. Tek bir yanlış sözünde, tek bir yanlış hareketinde infazcıları üzerine salarım."
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard, scowling jealously at Nuncius, mutters:{/n} "Allow me, Lord Captain. Triasomata, before you stands {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, Lord Captain of this vessel and sovereign of its crew. Solely by {mf|his|her} grace do you still live — one wrong word, one wrong movement, and I will personally call the enforcers down upon you."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nuncius'a kıskançlıkla kaşlarını çatan Abelard mırıldanıyor.{/n} "İzninizle Lord Kaptan. Üçyeköz, karşında {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir{/g} {name} von Valancius duruyor. Kendisi bu geminin Lord Kaptanı ve mürettebatının hükümdarıdır. Onun lütfu sayesinde hâlâ hayattasın. Tek bir yanlış sözünde, tek bir yanlış hareketinde infazcıları üzerine salarım."

languages.text: {n}Abelard, wirft Nuncius einen mürrischen Blick zu und murmelt:{/n} "Wenn Ihr gestattet, Lord Captain. Triasomata, vor Euch steht {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}{mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}{/g} {name} von Valancius, Lord Captain dieses Schiffes und {mf|Souverän|Souveränin} seiner Besatzung. Allein {mf|seiner|ihrer} Gnade ist es zu verdanken, dass Ihr noch lebt ... beim ersten falschen Wort oder der ersten falschen Bewegung werde ich persönlich die Enforcer auf Euch hetzen."
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard, scowling jealously at Nuncius, mutters:{/n} "Allow me, Lord Captain. Triasomata, before you stands {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, Lord Captain of this vessel and sovereign of its crew. Solely by {mf|his|her} grace do you still live — one wrong word, one wrong movement, and I will personally call the enforcers down upon you."

traits.locale_text: {n}Abelard, wirft Nuncius einen mürrischen Blick zu und murmelt:{/n} "Wenn Ihr gestattet, Lord Captain. Triasomata, vor Euch steht {mf|{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Freihändler{/g}|Freihändlerin} {name} von Valancius, Lord Captain dieses Schiffes und {mf|Souverän|Souveränin} seiner Besatzung. Allein {mf|seiner|ihrer} Gnade ist es zu verdanken, dass Ihr noch lebt ... beim ersten falschen Wort oder der ersten falschen Bewegung werde ich persönlich die Enforcer auf Euch hetzen."
